creator: openjdk@getsnappy.com
text:
Created attachment 147371
pciconf, /var/log/messages

Hello,
I'm trying to put together a new Freebsd 10 desktop and am having trouble getting the i915kms to work.  When I go to start Xorg I my screen flashes between colors.  I believe the source is the kernel module and this line in the /var/log/messages:

error: [drm:pid1526:drm_fb_helper_single_fb_probe] *ERROR* Failed to attach fbd device: 6

I'm using the HD Graphics 2000 chipset.  Currently everything works ok with the "vesa" driver, but I'd love to help track down and help fix the source of this error.  


I have more verbose logging with hw.dmi.debug=1, but it was too big to attach to this bug.

Thanks,
Brian Gardner
